Web Service Endpoint# GET /v1/appClipDefaultExperienceLocalizations/{id}/relationships/appClipHeaderImage

App Store Connect API 3.6+## [URL](/documentation/AppStoreConnectAPI/GET-v1-appClipDefaultExperienceLocalizations-_id_-relationships-appClipHeaderImage#url)



```
GET https://api.appstoreconnect.apple.com/v1/appClipDefaultExperienceLocalizations/{id}/relationships/appClipHeaderImage
```

## [Path Parameters](/documentation/AppStoreConnectAPI/GET-v1-appClipDefaultExperienceLocalizations-_id_-relationships-appClipHeaderImage#path-parameters)

`id``string` (Required)

### [Getting Metadata for Your Default App Clip Experience](/documentation/AppStoreConnectAPI/GET-v1-appClipDefaultExperienceLocalizations-_id_-relationships-appClipHeaderImage#Getting-Metadata-for-Your-Default-App-Clip-Experience)

[`Read Localization Information of a Default App Clip Experience`](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/get-v1-appclipdefaultexperiencelocalizations-_id_)Get localized metadata that appears on the App Clip card of a specific default App Clip experience.[`Read App Clip Card Image Information for a Localized Default App Clip Experience`](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/get-v1-appclipdefaultexperiencelocalizations-_id_-appclipheaderimage)Get the image that appears on the App Clip card, specific to a locale, for a default App Clip experience.
